heading: Governing body
label: 152905 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152905(a)36:2906., , §§ 5 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, .Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–56198 Stat. 2911152905(b)36:2907.152905(c)36:2905 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office).The words “in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:2906 and “in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:2907 are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152905(a)36:2906., , §§ 5 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, .Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–56198 Stat. 2911152905(b)36:2907.152905(c)36:2905 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office).The words “in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:2906 and “in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:2907 are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation or bylaws.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation or bylaws.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: c .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, or national origin.
